Off Calendar Jun-05-2024 Continued To Jun-17-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF AIDA VIDUYA's Motion Motion To Strike Defendant'S "Supplemental" Expert Witness Kirsten White.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
JOHN FITZPATRICK YANNUCCI, ESQ., Law Office of, (415) 981-7500, for Plaintiff.
EMILY GENGE, Esq., of GORDON REES SCULLY MANSUKHANI, LLP, for Defendant.

Counsel for Plaintiff does not stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem.

The matter is discussed, at conclusion of discussion, Plaintiffs Motion To Strike Defendant's "Supplemental" Expert Witness Kirsten White is continued to Master Calendar Jury on Jun-17-2024 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 206, per Judge Ulmer. The Judge Pro Tem is to prepare and submit to the court a report and recommendation.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
